game_name: Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Feature added in this sequel: characters can perform a double jump

special_mechanics.name: Luke Skywalker Force Powers
special_mechanics.description: Collectible Force Powers available after Dagobah missions for Luke character

special_mechanics.name: Luke Lightsaber Block
special_mechanics.description: Luke can block incoming attacks and deflect blaster fire using lightsaber

special_mechanics.name: Han Solo Grenade Throw
special_mechanics.description: Han Solo can throw grenades as secondary weapon mechanic

special_mechanics.name: Chewbacca Spinning Attack
special_mechanics.description: Chewbacca power-up enabling spinning attack mechanic

special_mechanics.name: Mode 7 Vehicle Sequences
special_mechanics.description: Quasi-3D vehicle sequences using Mode 7 effects (e.g., AT-AT attack)

tier_notes: Tier 2 classification: Available sources provide gameplay descriptions and feature documentation but no quantified physics parameters. No ROM data or empirical measurements available. Movement physics inferred from design features (double jump, multiple characters) but exact values not documented.
